chin_falam.set_a_goal_for_today: ☀️ Nihin caah goal khat na set lai maw?
chin_falam.or_skip_no_pressure: Asiloah skip — pressure a um lo.
chin_falam.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: cu mi tampi nih an thawknak a si — na kutdong hna cu a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ; cungah an um
chin_falam.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: button in halh. Dyslexia font, audio cues, high-contrast, large-key keyboard, le a dang — mah hna cu tool an si, thlennak an si lo.
chin_falam.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Timer a um lo, race a um lo, streak dannak a um lo. Namah thawngin kal. Zeitikcaan ah rulh.
chin_falam.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: drill — AI nih na grade level ah na duhmi thil kong practice text a ṭial.
chin_falam.and_it_will_illustrate_what_you_type: kha halh law na ṭialmi kha illustrate a tuah lai.
chin_falam.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: a thleng khawh — a cunglei i color swatch tluan cu 5 visual theme ah an thleng. Asiloah
chin_falam.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Clinician asiloah saya nih IEP goal a set khawh i
chin_falam.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: A liammi ni 30 chungah session pakhat tluk um nak calendar ni hlei. Rulh ni caah dannak a um lo.
chin_falam.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Text kha ṭial asiloah paste tuah. Ṭ hminh hmang, nambat, le mark hmanmi hna cu ṭha tein an ṭuan.
chin_falam.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — hi session cu khoihkham a si lai lo. Pressure a um lo, record a um lo.
chin_falam.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Asiloah thawk nakhnga Space asiloah Enter bet. Drill chungah zeitikcaan ah Esc bet in chuak khawh.
chin_falam.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: English si lomi passage hna nih ASCII lawng an hman (accent / tilde a um lo) cucaah keyboard i key hna cu practice target ah an um rih.
chin_falam.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: tahchunhnak, space, uico, Minecraft, tipi, Maine i dai caan
chin_falam.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Kut in ṭialmi passage set, AI hmang lo in a ṭuanmi. Lakmi passage hna cu na library ah an lut; zarh khat hnu zarh khat passage khat cu text thar sertuahmi nak IEP trend caah baseline a ṭha deuh.
chin_falam.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Tuhlei ah sertuahmi passage hna. Hman ṭhannak caah zeimizeimi drill. A hlun bik cu 9-nak na sertuah tikah a tlak lai.
chin_falam.no_text_loaded_for_this_drill: Hi drill caah text load a si lo.
chin_falam.warmup_mode_session_will_not_be_saved: Warmup mode — session khoihkham a si lai lo
chin_falam.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Bar khat cio = 10-second window chungah ṭialmi char. WPM zoh awkah hover.
chin_falam.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Na lehnak nih saya hna kha nambat nih tuanbia dihlak a chim lomi caan an hmuh khawhnak ah a bawmh.
chin_falam.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Hi session hi zeitindah a kal? "Nem tein ka thawk, ka i zuam rih, slow-motion mode ka hman..."
chin_falam.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: Note cu hi session he khoihkham a si. IEP report le CSV export ah a langh lai.
chin_falam.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: A hnuhnung image kha thawknak thawk lo in image-to-image hmangin ṭhatter
chin_falam.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Hi image hi PNG file ah download
chin_falam.top_miss_this_session: Hi session i palhnak a tam bik:
chin_falam.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Na score teinak awkah text khan hmanthan
chin_falam.undo_this_session_entirely: Hi session hi a dihlak in hru
chin_falam.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Ṭial thawk hlan ah second zat chung passage kimtling a langhter. Hmasa relh in a ṭhalonak, cun sertuah a duhmi sianginngak hna a bawmh. Sianginngak nih zeitikcaan ah count-in a skip khawh.
chin_falam.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Active typing minute zat hnu ah (paih caan cu chim a si lo), rulh awkah nem tein hngalhnak a langh. Drill khat cio ah voikhat a chuah. Thawknak in off a si.
chin_falam.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Tool i langhnak dihlak thleng. High-contrast mode cu theme hna a i tluar. Kawaii cu ceu theme a si; a dang hna cu dark variant an si.
chin_falam.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Tuhmi char, button, le mark swatch caah hmanmi highlight color kha thleng. A dawng zoh mi sianginngak nih a dai tuk timi asiloah focus awkah color lum a duhmi caah. High-contrast mode nih hi a i tluar.
chin_falam.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Drill text tawi asiloah sau thim. "Tawi" nih focus harnak asiloah bawinak a ngeimi sianginngak a bawmh; "Sau" cu endurance sertuahmi sianginngak caah. Drill nih thimnak he a tlukmi sample a ngei lo ahcun zeimizeimi a hman.
chin_falam.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Drill screen i nem tein a pulse mi dot nih rhythm a langhter. Nem tein na kal ahcun dannak A UM LO — reference a si, caan limit a si lo. Motor-planning caah a ṭhat. Thawknak in off a si.
chin_falam.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Hi hi namah hmun a si. Zeicaah dah practice na tuah? Nihin na target zeidah a si? Clinician IEP goal he a hlei.
chin_falam.why_i_m_practicing_shown_on_menu: Zeicaah practice ka tuah (menu ah langh)
chin_falam.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: tahchunhnak, "Typing cu tuhah a har, sihmanhsehlaw kamah tuanbia hna ka ṭial khawh lai." · "Ka nu bawmhnak lo in ka pi sinah email ka thawn duh." · "Rang tein ṭial = homework caan a tlawm deuh."
chin_falam.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Nihin goal cu namah ta a si — na phanh lo ahcun na cungah relh a si lo. Thaicaa ah amah tein reset.
chin_falam.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: IEP-style goal kha hilei ah set. Drill screen ah a langh i progress report ah amah tein a luh. Progress note taktak na tuah lai ahcun lawng aherhmi a si.
chin_falam.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Initials asiloah min lem hman — AlloFlow cu FERPA-safe ah tuah a si.
chin_falam.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: tahchunhnak, Large-key keyboard he home-row a duh deuh; speed a ṭhan hlan ah palhnak tlawmter.
chin_falam.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Accommodations + IEP goal + audio theme kha JSON ah khoihkham, asiloah tool dang in profile import. Session history cu copy A SI LO — mah cu sianginngak khat cio he a um.
chin_falam.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Full backup nih sessions, personal best, mastery, error heatmap, le library pahnih an i telh — sianginngak record dihlak. Browser data na hru hlan asiloah tool na thlen hlan ah hman.
chin_falam.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Na thanhnak lam. Hawikom he i tahchunh a um lo — namah lawng, caan chung.
chin_falam.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Trend, report, CSV a nawnh. Skill tree cu all-time a si.
chin_falam.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Note khat telh asiloah thlen. Blur asiloah Ctrl+Enter ah khoihkham.
chin_falam.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: A hring Δ = ṭhannak · a sen = regression · a hnal = biaceihnak a um lo (caan, accommodations zat).
chin_falam.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Error key a tam bik drill in · all-time
chin_falam.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drill phundang nih derhnak phundang a langhter. Key har hna a target mi drill thimnak caah hi hman.
chin_falam.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Hi hna nih accommodations zuamnak an ropui — thuhnak a si lo. Bawmhtu a hmanmi cu ṭhawnnak a si, derhnak a si lo.
chin_falam.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: Accommodation khat cio on vs off i WPM average. Drill type hna a i kalh — drill i kalhnak nih a palh khawh, cucaah biakhiahnak biapi caah a tanglei i report i per-drill breakdown hman.
chin_falam.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: A dihlak thim awkah report kha bet, asiloah a tanglei i button hman.
chin_falam.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Nu le pa sinah email caah biafang 2-4 plain-language summary copy
chin_falam.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Na baseline, trend, le IEP report hilei ah hmuh awkah na drill hmasabik kha dih.
chin_falam.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Tuhmi filter he a tlakmi session a um lo.
chin_falam.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: Drill card le nav button karlak ah pemh
chin_falam.activate_the_focused_drill_card: Focus mi drill card kha activate
chin_falam.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Na drill hnuhnung kha hmanthan (fast jump)
chin_falam.abandon_drill_progress_won_t_save: Drill kaltak (progress khoihkham a si lai lo)
chin_falam.on_any_screen_with_a_form: Form a ngeimi screen zeizat ah
chin_falam.move_to_next_field_button: A hnu field / button ah pemh
chin_falam.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Typing Practice chungah a um paoh cu keyboard in phanh khawh a si — mah cu screen-reader le motor-planning accommodations hmangtu hna caah design a si.
chin_falam.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Drill-intro screen i accommodation toggle hna cu Tab hmangin keyboard lawng in phanh khawh a si — hi tool i zeihmanh caah drag a herh lo.
chin_falam.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Optional game mode. Biafang hna cu a tanglei in an kai; a cung bik biafang kha ṭial in thianh. Stack nih a cung a phanh ahcun game a dih. Leaderboard a um lo, streak guilt a um lo — personal best lawng.
chin_falam.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Theme khat cio nih mascot a ngei i playfield, menu, le summary screen ah a langh. Na tuahmi kha an leh — combo, hriamnak, ral doh, ihmuh, tei, sunhnak.
chin_falam.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Bot sinah thawn awkah attack biafang khat thim
chin_falam.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ ATTACK READY — thawn awkah biafang khat thim
chin_falam.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Card kha bet ASILOAH 1 / 2 / 3 bet in thawn. Thawn lo in chuak awkah Esc bet. Na thim lio ah na stack cu a khan a si.
chin_falam.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ Dinh — stack pahnih an khan cia. Zulh awkah Resume asiloah Esc bet.
chin_falam.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Foundation ser. Nem + hremh nih rang + palh a tei.
chin_falam.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Fek tein progression. Accuracy floor kha zohkhenh.
chin_falam.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Speed + accuracy cu productive band ah. Fek tein practice.
chin_falam.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: WPM sang a phanh cia. Speed ṭhatnak a tlawm chin.
chin_falam.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Speed nih accuracy budget a kaih. Nem deuhmi target ah kir.
chin_falam.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Slider panga nih na practice target a tune. Widget nih na zone kha discrete state 5 chung pakhat ah a langhter i WPM-accuracy Pareto frontier a ṭi. Tune ah score a um lo — hlathlannak cu fek mi practice point hmuhnak ah a um.
chin_falam.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = WPM khat cio ah phanh khawhmi accuracy a ṭha bik. A cung = a si khawh lo; a tang = ṭhannak hmun.
chin_falam.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Hypothesis (free text): Na fek mi target zeidah a si? Accuracy floor nih effective WPM kha zeitindah a thleng?
chin_falam.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Na dinh — prompt hunhmi hna langhter
chin_falam.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: WPM=80, accuracy=98 set. Aa tlak maw? Na zone marker he tahchunh.
chin_falam.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Accuracy floor kha 80% ah tlaihter. Effective WPM a i ṭhang maw?
chin_falam.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Pro hna nih 70+ WPM ah 95%+ an zohkhenh. Cukah a phanhmi practice lam kha hlathlai.
chin_falam.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Accuracy sang he target nem deuh nih session khat cio ah text tam deuh a chuahter khawh. Zoh.
chin_falam.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Tradeoff ka hngalh — namah bia in chim
chin_falam.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Namah bia in chim: WPM, accuracy, le momentum cu zeitindah an i pehtlaih? Typing practice caah Pareto frontier cu zeidah a si?
chin_falam.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Design note: discrete 5-zone marker; Pareto curve nih tradeoff space a langhter; target "hremh" a um lo — design ruangah.
